name: Chat Interface
description: Provides a direct multi-turn chat UI for conversing with Claude or Gemini, including image paste/drag-drop, model selection, and Gemini image generation display.

Managers/ChatManager.cs.content:
class ChatManager
  PopulateModelCombo() -> void
  HandleNewChat() -> void
  HandleSendClick() -> void
  HandleInputKeyDown(KeyEventArgs e) -> void
  HandlePaste() -> bool
  HandleDragOver(DragEventArgs e) -> bool
  HandleDrop(DragEventArgs e) -> bool
  HandleModelComboChanged() -> void
  CancelAndDispose() -> void
  Dispose() -> void

Managers/GeminiImagePanel.cs.content:
class GeminiImagePanel
  Create(AgentTask task, out RichTextBox outputBox, out WrapPanel imageGallery) -> DockPanel
  AddImage(WrapPanel gallery, string imagePath) -> void
  SetOpenFolderHandler(DockPanel root, string folderPath) -> void

patterns: Image gallery in side panel for Gemini image results
